title: Tama’s Kidnapping Exposes Wano’s Cruelty
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Kiku, Luffy, Unknown person #3, Okobore Town Villagers as Luffy and Zoro push into Kuri and Bakura Town as Tama’s kidnapping exposes the cruelty of the Beast Pirates.
scene: Luffy and Zoro move through Kuri and Bakura Town while Tama’s kidnapping pulls them into open conflict with the Beast Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Wano Country KURI- BAKURA DOWN

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Dammit...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Great Sumo Wrestler tournament

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Munch much

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ... I retreated earlier because of the weird aura that Ronin had, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I abso- lutely want to make o-kiku my wife, no matter what it takes.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have my social standing, my fame, and safe food to provide for her.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There's no way she can reject me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't worry about something so useless, you idiot.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What'd you say!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's from the town of leftovers, right? The people there are low-class individuals who aren't allowed to enter Orochi's territory.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Squeak Squeak Squeak Squeak!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You should just take her by force and burn her house down.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hell, you could even kill her entire family so that she doesn't have a home to return to.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All you need to do is ensure she cannot survive without you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You have Samural Blood in Your Veins!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: THIS COUNTRY HAS A CLEAR SOCIAL HERARCHY. YOU KNOW!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A national superstar athlete such as yourself doesn't need to show restraint in dealing with the lower class. You'll just set a bad example for others!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hehehe...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I guess you're right.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I definite- Ly can...

dialogue.speaker: Kiku
dialogue.text: DO WHAT- EVER I WANT WITH O-KIKU!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yokozuna!! Did our offering not suit your tastes?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes, it has been our pet for many years...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Cook it and feed it to me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I see a racoon dog over there...!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I love racoon dog meat.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Within BAKURA Town- at a certain residence...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: As expected, you brought her here quickly...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Huff... huff...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Gazelleman... She's the one, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: whereze... huff...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, poor child... she looks like she's about to cry.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Huff... huff...

dialogue.speaker: Okobore Town Villagers
dialogue.text: Waters: When

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...I... I ain't gonna cry!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Huff... huff...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Huff...Huff... whereze...Huff...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: My sides hurt...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: whereze...huff... huff... whereze...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's enough. Get out of the way, gazelle- man!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Your constant wheezing is annoy- ing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: whereze... wheeze... huff... huff... whereze... whereze...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You need to work on your endurance, you fool!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I wasn't talking to you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop staring at my face all the time!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: UWAAA aghinnn, he's so SCAAAR RRYY!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He has a lion comin' out of his stomaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa Aaach!!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kuri storyline with 48 dialogue beats. The rescue of Tama brings Luffy, Zoro, Kiku, and Law into direct contact with Wano’s local oppression.
